title: Abrodictyum sprucei
taxonomy: Abrodictyum sprucei is a member of the plant family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of ferns. It is classified as a genus within the subfamily Polypodioideae. The family Polypodiaceae is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that reproduce by spores. Abrodictyum sprucei is further classified as a species within the genus Abrodictyum. It is native to Southeast Asia and is often found in tropical forests.
